ai_summary: AKI India Limited underwent significant board changes, appointing three new independent directors and one non-independent director, leading to the reconstitution of key committees like Audit and Nomination & Remuneration, which are now chaired by independent members. While this strengthens board oversight, a notable red flag is the appointment of Ms. Naba Fatima as a non-independent director, who is explicitly identified as the sister of both the Managing Director and another Non-Executive Director, potentially increasing related-party influence on the board.
